title: Celestial Mist
description: A cool galaxy sky overlay compatible with Optifine/Skyboxify!
body: ![LogoBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/765988d9625967ded97e5719d28ea81404788032_0.webp) # Celestial Mist ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/celestial-mist?style=for-the-badge) ![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/celestial-mist?style=for-the-badge) > In this sky overlay, soft pastel nebulae blend across the horizon with shades of blue, teal, and faint green, while countless small stars scatter across the sky. The result creates a calm, dreamy atmosphere that makes the world feel peaceful and immersive while playing. The pack uses the Optifine format, so it will require a compatibility mod to use. > Recommended: Turn off Sun & Moon [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/M4M61V7YTQ) ### Issue? Let me know on Discord!
